name: New Language Extractor

labels: "good first issue, new-extractor"
assignees: ""
---

## Language

Which programming language should be supported?

## Tree-sitter Grammar

Link to the tree-sitter grammar (e.g., https://github.com/tree-sitter/tree-sitter-rust).

## Symbols to Extract

Which symbol types are most important for this language?

- [ ] Functions / methods
- [ ] Classes / structs / types
- [ ] Interfaces / traits / protocols
- [ ] Constants / enums
- [ ] Modules / namespaces / packages
- [ ] Other: \_\_\_

## Sample Code

Provide a small representative code sample that a good extractor should handle:

```
// paste sample code here
```

## Notes

Any language-specific edge cases or considerations (generics, macros, nested types, etc.).
